errors.name: Water Supply Failure
errors.detection_rules:
• if the water supply is not finished within 20 minutes
• Every 10 minutes, the buzzer will alarm for 10 seconds

errors.name: Drain Failure
errors.detection_rules:
• if the water level doesn't reach the reset level with 15 minutes from the beginning of the drain
• Every 10 minutes, the buzzer will alarm for 10 seconds

errors.name: Lid Opening Failure
errors.detection_rules:
• if the lid is opened during delay start, wash, rinse and spin processes
• Every 10 minutes, the buzzer will alarm for 10 seconds

errors.name: Unbalance Failure
errors.detection_rules:
• if the clothes is collected on one side during spin and the automatic unbalance correction didn’t help to rectify the issue
• Every 10 minutes, the buzzer will alarm for 10 seconds

errors.name: Overflow Failure
errors.detection_rules:
• Continuous Water Supply Failure 
• if the water reaches the normal overflow level, drain pump is operating only
• if for whatever reason, the water reaches a dangerous water level. The drain pump is operating and the water inlets are closed
• if for some reason, the water remains at the dangerous overflow level for 5 minutes. this error alarms
• Every 10 minutes, the buzzer will alarm for 10 seconds

errors.name: Abnormal Water Level Sensor Reading
errors.detection_rules:
• if the detected water level frequency is out of the normal range
• Every 10 minutes, the buzzer will alarm for 10 seconds

errors.name: Water Supply Wrong Connection Failure
errors.detection_rules:
• if the threshold value of "50" has been exceeded on the cold side valve (when cold option is being selected)
• Every 10 minutes, the buzzer will alarm for 10 seconds

errors.name: Abnormal Thermistor Reading
errors.detection_rules:
• if the thermistor is short or open circuit
• Every 10 minutes, the buzzer will alarm for 10 seconds

errors.name: Motor CW Rotation Failure
errors.detection_rules:
• if the motor is short or open ciruit in the CW direction during wash
• Every 10 minutes, the buzzer will alarm for 10 seconds

errors.name: Motor CCW Rotation Failure
errors.detection_rules:
• if the motor is short or open ciruit in the CCW direction during wash
• Every 10 minutes, the buzzer will alarm for 10 seconds

errors.name: Motor Spin Rotation Failure
errors.detection_rules:
• if the motor is short or open ciruit in the CW direction during Spin
• Every 10 minutes, the buzzer will alarm for 10 seconds

errors.name: Motor CW/CCW Rotation Failure
errors.detection_rules:
• if the motor is short or open ciruit in the CW & CCW direction during wash
• Every 10 minutes, the buzzer will alarm for 10 seconds

errors.name: Abnormal Water Leakage Failure
errors.detection_rules:
• if during wash (not filling) there is no water in the tub
• Every 10 minutes, the buzzer will alarm for 10 seconds

errors.name: Drain Filter Failure
errors.detection_rules:
• if the frequency change rate is low
• Every 10 minutes, the buzzer will alarm for 10 seconds

errors.name: MEMS Failure
errors.detection_rules:
• if the mems is not working due to being defected or assembeled wrong
• Every 10 minutes, the buzzer will alarm for 10 seconds

errors.name: General Motor Failure
errors.detection_rules:
• if during machine startup for some reason the motor is still rotating and doesn't stop within a minute
• Every 10 minutes, the buzzer will alarm for 10 seconds

errors.name: Abnormal Water When Dry Failure
errors.detection_rules:
• if during spin there is water in the tub when it shouldn't
• the machine tries to automatically rectifies the issue but after 5 trials if it didn’t success, it displays this error
• Every 10 minutes, the buzzer will alarm for 10 seconds

errors.name: CRC Mismatch Failure
errors.detection_rules: nan

errors.name: Low Power Failure
errors.detection_rules:
• if after power on the voltage level drops below 160v for 5 minutes
• Every 10 minutes, the buzzer will alarm for 10 seconds

errors.name: Water Supply High Temp Failure
errors.detection_rules:
• if during water filling (hot or warm option is selected), the water temp exceeds the 63 deg threshold
• the machine tries to rectifies the issue automatically by opening the cold valve after 30 seconds from exceeding the threshold. If it wasn't successful for 2 minutes, this error appears
• Every 10 minutes, the buzzer will alarm for 10 seconds
